title: Mosquito Repellent Lamp Camping Lantern Bug Zapper,Portable IPX6 Waterproof Mosquito Killer Lantern,Retractable Hook,USB Rechargeable LED Lantern and Flashlight,Camping equipment accessories
features: 【Mosquito Killer Lantern】:This is a 2-in-1 unit that can works as a zapper for killing mosquitoes and as a lantern for lighting.Retractable Hook and Removable Lampshade,The zapper lantern effectively kills mosquitoes and other biting insects with physical method, which is much cleaner and safer than its chemical counterparts.

【Adjustable Brightness】:The camping lantern has 4 different lighting modes, providing you 4 different brightness levels. A removable lampshade brings you soft light. It is designed to be put in both ways - you can hang it up on a string or a tree branch, or put it upside down like a ground lamp.

【IPX6 WATERPROOF RATING】:The camping light is weather-proof and can be submerged in water, exposed to rain and cold weather and still illuminate your tent at night.you can clean the lantern under running tap water; easy to get rid of insect remains.

【LIGHT OPTIONS】: This particular mosquito zapper lamp has 4 lighting options. The low setting gives off 20% of the lamp’s light. The middle level gives off 50% of the lamp's light. There is also a high setting that displays 100% light. The mosquito zapper setting just might be the best setting on this lamp. The lantern is only 5 inches tall and 3.5 inches wide, weighs only 210g/0.46lb,so it’s easily transportable.

【RECHARGEABLE BATTERY KEEPS THE BUGS AWAY ALL NIGHT】:The rechargeable 2000mAh Lithium Ion battery powers a 360nm-400nm ultraviolet light that creates a 16ft x 16ft protected area. The mosquito killer lasts up to 15 hours, while the lowest setting in the three settings for the lantern can last up to 20 hours.Battery Low? The camping light can be charged easily by plugging the included USB cable into any USB power source, power bank, battery pack or solar charger.
description: Product Description Powerful mosquito lamp 100% safe for humans and pets, works without the use of hazardous chemicals, does not emit harmful fumes and does not pollute the environment! 2-in-1 mosquito killer lamp, a must-have for camping Mosquito Repellent Lamp Camping Lantern Insect Killer,With telescopic hook, it is suitable for various scenes to keep mosquitoes away from you Product Information 01：hidden hook：the hook can be retracted and carried conveniently 02：usb charging Product Information 03：safety fence:7mm spacing effectively protects fingers from touching the grid 04：the grid is surrounded by 360 degrees Product Information 05：Detachable silicone lampshade is drop-proof 06：IPX6 waterproof and can be rinsed off directly with water Product Features: 1.USB charging 2.Mosquito Repellent Lamp 3.Night light 4.Waterproof IPX6 5.Lightning-protection 6.Portable Features and modes Package Includes: 1 x Mosquito Zapper Lantern 1 x USB Cable 1 x User Manual 4 lighting modes Separate illumination and separate mosquito control mode High Light (100% lighting) ≥ 180 Lumen, ≥ 6h Normal Light (50% lighting) ≥ 90 Lumen, ≥ 12h Low Light (20% lighting) ≥ 30 Lumen, ≥ 20h Mosquito control mode ≥ 15h, UV Effective Range: 16 ft x 16 ft Specification: Weight: 210g/ 0.46lb Dimension: φ3.46" x 5.08" Zapper-Only Mode ≥ 15h Voltage Input: 5.0±0.2V Current Input: 900mA±100mA Full Charge Time: 2~4 hours (depends on the input current) Battery: 3.7V/ 2000mAh Zapper Voltage: 1000V Hint: Do not look directly into the LED, as this can cause eye damage.A lthough the mains has a safety fence, you are not allowed to touch it. To avoid accidents, you need to keep it out of the reach of children.R emember not to submerge the zapper in water for a long time, as this can cause damage to the product.T urn off the device when cleaning the zapper.P lacement position：1m above the ground, 2m from the human body
